title: triceratostris hio
side_effects: Triceratostris hio can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing severe dizziness, nausea, and vomiting in individuals who consume it in large quantities. Prolonged exposure to its volatile oils can cause respiratory problems, including coughing and shortness of breath. In rare cases, excessive use of the triceratostris hio plant can lead to allergic reactions, resulting in itchy skin rashes, swelling, and an increased heart rate. Furthermore, improper preparation and consumption of the plant may also cause stomach ulcers and kidney damage in susceptible individuals.
